name: iso27001-manager
description: A web-based Information Security Management System (ISMS) manager built with Flask. Covers ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls, NIS2 compliance, GDPR (DPA, DSAR, RoPA), risk management, asset management, incident management, audit management, policy management, business continuity, supplier/third-party risk, training & competence, KPI dashboard, AI assistant, and AD/LDAP authentication.
